title: Save and share results in k6 Cloud

blocks.content: In this milestone, you authenticate the k6 CLI against Grafana Cloud, stream a local run to k6 Cloud, and review the saved run in the browser.
You'll log in with a personal token and stack slug, then execute locally while uploading metrics.

In Grafana Cloud, open **Testing & synthetics** > **Performance** > **Settings** and copy your API token and stack slug.

Run login locally (replace placeholders yourself; do not share tokens):

```bash
k6 cloud login --token <YOUR_API_TOKEN> --stack <YOUR_STACK_SLUG>
```

Refer to [Tokens and CLI authentication](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/k6/author-run/tokens-and-cli-authentication/) if you need more detail.

Execute the baseline while streaming metrics:

```bash
k6 cloud run --local-execution baseline.js
```

`--local-execution` keeps the load on your machine while persisting results to Grafana Cloud. This differs from a fully cloud-hosted run that uploads the script to Grafana infrastructure.

Copy the run URL printed near the end of the output, for example:

```text
output: cloud (https://acmecorp.grafana.net/a/k6-app/runs/123456)
```
The CLI portion is complete once you have a cloud run URL.

blocks.title: Review the run in Grafana Cloud

blocks.content: You'll open the saved run and confirm overview, thresholds, and checks match what you saw locally.
In the main menu, navigate to **Testing & synthetics > Performance**.
Paste the run URL into your browser (or locate the same run in the project list) and sign in to Grafana Cloud if prompted.
Review **Performance Overview** for response time trends, request rates, and other headline metrics from the streamed run.
Select the **Thresholds** tab and confirm each threshold shows the expected pass or fail state.
Open the **Checks** tab to inspect per-check pass rates. Share the URL with teammates so everyone references the same baseline artifact.
You can now compare future runs against this stored baseline directly inside Grafana Cloud k6.
You have finished the hands-on milestones. Continue to the wrap-up for suggested next paths.
